Is #tbt still a thing?? A look behind the scenes at the making of “Beautiful Mistakes”!

Small stages make a big impact. They’re where we got our start. But due to the pandemic, 90% of the independent venues we know and love are at risk of shutting down permanently. This weekend, NIVA (@nivassoc) and @YouTubeMusic have partnered to present Save Our Stages Fest, a 3-day virtual music festival featuring original performances from some of our favorite musicians performing live from iconic indie stages around the US. #SOSFEST kicks off TONIGHT at 5PM PT / 8PM ET! Tune in and please consider donating to the National Independent Venue Association Emergency Relief Fund.
Let’s #SaveOurStages →
yt.be/music/SOSFest • @thetroubadour @theroxy @theviperroom @thewhiskyagogo

node.title: Save Our Stages - A tribute to independent venues

node.text:
VIVA M5LV. We’re headed back to Las Vegas in 2024 for SIXTEEN more shows at Dolby Live @ Park MGM! 🎰

May 17, 18, 22, 25, 26, 29, 31
June 1 
September 27, 28
October 2, 4, 5, 9, 11, 12

CITI and Fan Club presales begin tomorrow at 10AM PT. Tickets go on sale to the public this Saturday, Dec 9 at 10AM PT. Check out maroon5.com/tour for more info. #M5LV 💫

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Maroon 5 on January 10, 2024 tagging @siriusxm, and @adamlevine. May be an image of 1 person, magazine and text that says 'I'M PLAYING MY FAVORITE SONGS ON LITHIUM GUEST DJ ADAM LEVINE OF MAROON 5 LISTEN ON SiriusXM S'.

node.text: I’m playing some of my favorite songs I grew up with in the ‘90s on @siriusxm Lithium. Check out the full extended show now with all 31 songs I picked (including “Loving the Small Time” by Kara’s Flowers) on the Sirius XM app or at the link in bio.

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Maroon 5 on January 10, 2024 tagging @siriusxm, and @adamlevine. May be an image of 1 person, magazine and text that says 'I'M PLAYING MY FAVORITE SONGS ON LITHIUM GUEST DJ ADAM LEVINE OF MAROON 5 LISTEN ON SiriusXM S'.

node.text: No matter where we go, there you are. Thank you for always making us feel at home and for a great 2023. See you next year! ✌️💖🎉🥂
@adamlevine remembers how Graham Nash helped get studio time that led to @maroon5 landing a record deal.
What is the meaning behind @maroon5’s name? Adam Levine reveals there’s only one person outside the band that knows: Billy Joel.
@adamlevine honors Sinéad O’Connor with a performance of her song “Nothing Compares 2 U” live on the #SternShow.
